parameters.prompt: One isolated freestanding two-crew spacecraft flight-control desk, exactly 4.8 m wide, 1.15 m high and 1.25 m deep. Low central sightline, two angled instrument wings, two structural pedestals, black physical display bezels, guarded switches, rotary controls, handholds, ventilation and rear cable access. Furniture only with a complete readable outer silhouette and flat mounting feet, operator side faces -Z. No room shell, roof, wall, floor, window, seat, person, hologram, floating screen, text, logo, stand, ground or background.
parameters.texture_prompt: De-lit realistic flight hardware: dark low-glare composite, graphite anodized aluminum bezels, physical black glass, brushed titanium controls, restrained amber and cyan indicator lenses, subtle hand-contact wear. No baked highlights, pseudo-text, logos, broad dirt, random labels or active emissive content.

reasons: generated a deep equipment enclosure with two tall actuator-like towers instead of a low freestanding flight desk
operator sightline, display wings, control reach and mounting feet are not readable
cannot be isolated into the requested two-crew console without replacing most visible geometry
art_review.disposition: retain as a negative-control shape study; do not refine or promote
